title: Vancomycin
body_html:
Key Points
  • Is a glycopeptide antibiotic
  • Vancomycin is active against gram positive organisms
  • It has a long duration of action.
  • It can be given orally or intravenously.
  • It is typically used in treatment of C. difficile, MRSA infection and in endocarditis.
